messages.subject: Reminder: Spring compliance attestation (May 16 deadline)
messages.bodyText:
Team — Please complete the spring compliance attestation in Workday by Friday, May 16. No response needed if you have already submitted.

People Operations

messages.subject: FYI: Fire drill — Wednesday May 14, 10:15 AM
messages.bodyText:
The Centurion is included in the regional fire drill window on Wednesday, May 14 at 10:15 AM local. Front desk: use the laminated guest script at the pod.

Facilities

messages.subject: Menu note: Mother's Day brunch — May 11
messages.bodyText:
Brunch service ran 10:00–2:00. Guest feedback was strong on the pastry table. Please route any billing disputes to F&B shared inbox.

F&B Ops

messages.subject: Scheduled maintenance — guest Wi‑Fi — May 13, 2:00–3:30 AM
messages.bodyText:
Brief guest Wi‑Fi maintenance is scheduled overnight on May 13. Wired lobby workstations stay up. Post the standard door card at the desk.

IT Support

messages.subject: New micro‑course: de‑escalation at the front desk
messages.bodyText:
A 12‑minute refresher is live in the training portal. Completion by May 31 is requested for all guest‑facing roles.

L&D

messages.subject: Payroll calendar — May 2026
messages.bodyText:
Biweekly pay date: May 23. Timesheet lock: May 21, 11:59 PM. Managers: approve by May 22, 10:00 AM.

Payroll

messages.subject: Shift swap request — May 18 evening
messages.bodyText:
Hi team — I need coverage for the 3:00–11:00 PM desk shift on Sunday, May 18. I can trade May 19 opening or May 20 mid if that helps.

Sofia Rojas
Front Desk

draft.bodyText:
Good day Sofia,

Thank you for your message regarding the May 18 evening shift.

I am pleased to confirm that I can provide cover for the evening shift on 18 May, should you be able to take my opening shift on 19 May (07:00–15:00). Kindly reply to confirm, and I will update the roster and notify the supervisor accordingly.

Should you require any further information, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Kind regards,
The Centurion — Reservations

messages.subject: PTO blackout clarification — Memorial Day week
messages.bodyText:
Please confirm whether the property is treating May 24–26 as a soft blackout for non‑exempt front‑office PTO. Two agents submitted overlapping requests.

People Ops

draft.bodyText:
Good day,

Thank you for your enquiry regarding PTO over Memorial Day week.

Please note that we are observing a soft blackout from 24–26 May: PTO remains subject to director approval, and same‑day front‑desk coverage must be named on the request. I will reply to the two agents with the policy link and copy you for visibility.

Kindly let us know if you would like any additional detail reflected in that communication.

Kind regards,
The Centurion — Reservations

messages.subject: Q2 uniform order — sizes due May 20
messages.bodyText:
Please send consolidated sizes for new hires and replacements. Use the attached spreadsheet template from the last cycle.

Uniform Program

draft.bodyText:
Good day,

Thank you for your note on the Q2 uniform order.

We confirm receipt. We will collect sizes from the front‑office roster by 19 May and upload one consolidated file to the portal ahead of the 20 May cutoff.

Should you require anything further from our side, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Kind regards,
The Centurion — Reservations

messages.subject: Keycard access — contractor list for May 15
messages.bodyText:
Please confirm the three vendor names that should receive temporary B1 access on May 15 for the chiller inspection.

Security

draft.bodyText:
Good day,

Thank you for your request regarding temporary access for 15 May.

Please find the three confirmed vendors below:
• Northwind HVAC (lead: A. Patel)
• Elevate Scaffolding (lead: J. Cho)
• Citywide Fire Safety (lead: R. Ng)

Kindly issue 12‑hour access badges, expiring at 20:00 on the day.

Should you require any further detail, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Kind regards,
The Centurion — Reservations

messages.subject: Block inquiry — Chen / Morrison wedding — May 22–24, 2026
messages.bodyText:
We are planning 18 rooms (mix of doubles and kings) plus a hospitality suite for Friday–Sunday, May 22–24, 2026. Can you quote a group rate and breakfast inclusion? We need a 30‑room ceiling hold until June 1.

Harborline Events

draft.bodyText:
Good day,

Thank you for choosing The Centurion Hotel, and for your enquiry regarding the Chen / Morrison wedding block (22–24 May 2026).

We are pleased to inform you that we can accommodate your requirement for 18 rooms (mix of doubles and kings) plus a hospitality suite. Indicative rates, inclusive of breakfast for two, are as follows:
• Classic King / Double: R3 420 per night
• Deluxe King: R4 120 per night
• Hospitality suite (14th floor): R6 280 per night

We can extend a soft hold for up to 30 rooms until 1 June under group code CHEN‑MAY26. Kindly let us know if you would like us to proceed, and whether we should share the Iveri group deposit link with your team.

Should you require any further information or assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Kind regards,
The Centurion — Reservations

messages.subject: Corporate retreat — 32 rooms — May 27–29, 2026
messages.bodyText:
Need 32 rooms with breakout space adjacent if possible. Arrival afternoon May 27, departure morning May 29. AV on May 28 full day. Please confirm availability and catering intro contact.

Northfield Labs Travel

draft.bodyText:
Good day,

Thank you for your enquiry regarding the Northfield Labs corporate retreat (27–29 May 2026).

We are pleased to confirm that we can accommodate 32 rooms across floors 8–10, with a dedicated breakout space on level 9. Audio‑visual services are provided via our in‑house partner; we will copy them on all further correspondence.

Our proposed room rate is R3 760 per night, inclusive of breakfast. For catering, kindly direct introductions to centurion.catering@legacyhotels.com.

If the above is acceptable, we will hold the block for five business days pending a signed agreement. Kindly let us know how you wish to proceed.

Kind regards,
The Centurion — Reservations

messages.subject: Availability — Deluxe King — May 14–17, 2026
messages.bodyText:
Hi — Do you have a Deluxe King available for check‑in May 14 and check‑out May 17? Late arrival around 10:30 PM on the 14th. Non‑smoking, high floor if possible.

Thanks,
Jordan

draft.bodyText:
Good day Jordan,

Thank you for choosing The Centurion Hotel.

We are pleased to inform you that we have a Deluxe King room available for check‑in on 14 May and check‑out on 17 May 2026, non‑smoking, on a high floor (12). Your late arrival after 22:30 on 14 May has been noted on the reservation.

Kindly complete your booking using this link when you are ready: Complete booking on Iveri.

Should you require any further information or assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Kind regards,
The Centurion — Reservations

messages.subject: Two queens — weekend of May 16–18?
messages.bodyText:
Looking for two queens for May 16–18. If you do not have that room type, what is the closest alternative and price difference?

Priya

draft.bodyText:
Good day Priya,

Thank you for your enquiry regarding two queen beds for the weekend of 16–18 May.

Unfortunately, we are fully committed on our Two Queen inventory for those dates. The closest alternatives are:
(1) Deluxe King with a rollaway at R3 580 per night (before taxes), or
(2) Classic King at R3 220 per night (before taxes).

Should your dates be flexible, Two Queen rooms are available on 9–11 May or 23–25 May from R3 400 per night.

Kindly let us know which option suits you best, and we will gladly hold your preferred choice for 24 hours.

Kind regards,
The Centurion — Reservations

messages.subject: Airport shuttle from Midtown terminal?
messages.bodyText:
Does the hotel still run a shuttle from the Midtown air terminal on weekdays? We land 4:10 PM on May 19.

Minseo

draft.bodyText:
Good day Minseo,

Thank you for your enquiry regarding transport from the Midtown air terminal.

The Centurion Hotel does not operate its own shuttle; however, we partner with MetroLink Car Service, with sedan departures approximately every 30 minutes. The one‑way fare to the hotel is R860.

If you would like us to add your name for the 16:45 collection on 19 May, kindly reply with your mobile number and we will confirm with MetroLink on your behalf.

Should you require any further information, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Kind regards,
The Centurion — Reservations

messages.subject: Early check‑in request — May 21
messages.bodyText:
I have a 9:30 AM meeting near the property. Any chance of early check‑in on May 21? I am flexible on room category.

Ben

draft.bodyText:
Good day Ben,

Thank you for your request for early check‑in on 21 May.

Subject to departures the night before, early check‑in may be available from 12:00; guaranteed check‑in remains from 15:00. Should you require certainty before midday, we recommend reserving the night prior on our advance‑purchase Classic King rate (from R3 040 per night).

We will add a profile note for the front desk to prioritise your room once ready.

Kindly let us know how you would like to proceed.

Kind regards,
The Centurion — Reservations

messages.subject: Coverage for GM walkthrough — May 13, 9:00 AM
messages.bodyText: Need the desk double‑staffed 8:45–10:00 AM on May 13 for the GM property walkthrough. Who can anchor?

messages.subject: Re: Coverage for GM walkthrough — May 13, 9:00 AM
messages.bodyText:
I will anchor with Jamie on backup from 8:45–10:00. Lobby podium stocked and VIP arrivals list printed.

Reservations

draft.bodyText:
Good day Alex,

Thank you for your note.

Noted with thanks. I will confirm the arrangement with Jamie and add the coverage slot to the shared calendar as discussed.

Kind regards,
The Centurion — Reservations

messages.subject: Updated guest data handling checklist
messages.bodyText:
Attached summary replaces the January version. Train the team by May 31. Questions to the privacy mailbox only.

Legal

messages.subject: Re: Updated guest data handling checklist
messages.bodyText:
Acknowledged. Scheduling a 20‑minute huddle for front office on May 20.

Reservations

messages.subject: Re: Updated guest data handling checklist
messages.bodyText:
Please retain sign‑in sheets for one year. Thank you.

Legal

draft.bodyText:
Good day,

Thank you for your instruction regarding sign‑in sheet retention.

Noted. We will file the 20 May front‑office huddle sign‑in sheets with People Operations immediately following the session.

Should you require any further documentation from our side, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Kind regards,
The Centurion — Reservations
